app.name: DC Intel
auth.login.title: Welcome back
auth.register.title: Create your account
auth.toLogin: Already have an account? Log in
auth.err.passwordLen: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.err.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
search.placeholder: Search any stock — name or ticker
confidence.label: {pct}% confidence
confidence.tooltip: How sure the model is, based on its calibrated track record. 50% means a coin flip.
timeframe.label: Prediction window
predict.degraded: Live price is delayed — prediction paused. Try again shortly.
predict.modelUnavailable: This timeframe is still in testing — try another window.
accuracy.badge: {pct}% win rate over {n} predictions on this stock
accuracy.tooltip.title: Per-timeframe record
trending.title: Trending
indexes.title: Markets
calendar.title: Economic calendar
calendar.empty: No major events in the next 7 days
intel.title: Market intel
intel.confirmed.tooltip: A reputable news source corroborated this.
intel.unconfirmed.tooltip: Unverified social chatter — treat as a rumor.
intel.anomaly.headline: {sym} moved {pct} in {min} min with no official news — here's what traders are saying
whisper.title: Whisper EPS
whisper.explain: Whisper = the crowd's earnings estimate, compared with the official Wall Street consensus.
whisper.status.corroborated.tooltip: Several independent sources agree on this whisper.
whisper.status.tentative.tooltip: Some agreement, but thin or single-source — treat with caution.
whisper.status.no_reliable_whisper.toolt: Sources disagree too much to trust a number.
whisper.empty: No upcoming earnings whisper for this stock yet.
whisper.abstain: No reliable whisper yet — sources don't agree enough to show a number.
history.empty: No predictions yet — pick a timeframe to make the first one
history.trend.title: Your accuracy trend
history.scoreInfo.body: We check the price when the window closes. 'Rise' counts as a hit if the price ended higher than the entry price; 'Fall' if it ended lower; 'Flat' if it stayed within a small band.
xmkt.title: Across markets
state.error: Couldn't load this. Tap to retry.
state.empty.intel: Nothing notable in the last 48 hours
disclaimer: Predictions are statistical estimates for reference only — not investment advice. You are responsible for your own decisions.
notFound.title: Page not found
error.boundary.title: Something went wrong
